items.question_text: Under 8-7-1, the general oceanic procedures in Chapter 8 apply to the North Atlantic ICAO Region with _____ prescribed by this section.
items.explanation: Per 8-7-1, the section prescribes additions or exceptions to general Chapter 8 procedures.

items.question_text: Under 8-7-1, which ICAO region does Section 7 cover?
items.explanation: Per 8-7-1, this section covers the North Atlantic ICAO Region.

items.question_text: Under 8-7-2, vertical separation in the North Atlantic ICAO Region is provided in accordance with Chapter _____, Section 8, unless this section prescribes otherwise.
items.explanation: Per 8-7-2, vertical separation follows Chapter 4, IFR, Section 8.

items.question_text: Under 8-7-3, longitudinal separation in the North Atlantic ICAO Region is provided in accordance with Chapter 8, Section _____, unless this section prescribes otherwise.
items.explanation: Per 8-7-3, longitudinal separation follows Section 3 of Chapter 8.

items.question_text: Under 8-7-4, lateral separation in the North Atlantic ICAO Region is provided in accordance with Chapter 8, Section _____, unless this section prescribes otherwise.
items.explanation: Per 8-7-4, lateral separation follows Section 4 of Chapter 8.
